description: One priced line of a supplier's quotation, mapping to one RFQ line item (and thus to one requisition line). Holds the per-line unit price, line quantity quoted, and the promised lead time. Line-level detail is what makes the comparison line-for-line across suppliers and what flows into the awarded quotation, the contract price list, and the PO line. Sole editor is the supplier, like its parent quotation.

fields.name: lineId
fields.label: Quote Line No.
fields.validation: system-generated; unique within the quotation; immutable across negotiation revisions
fields.purpose: Stable key for one priced line so the comparison, negotiation versions, and award attach to a specific line of a specific quote.

fields.name: quotationId
fields.label: Quotation
fields.validation: the parent quotation; immutable; inherits the quote currency and the sole-editor (supplier) rule
fields.purpose: Binds the line to its quotation so all lines roll up to one supplier response and inherit the supplier, currency, and incoterm context.

fields.name: rfqLineRef
fields.label: RFQ Line
fields.validation: must reference a line of the parent RFQ; one quote line per RFQ line per quotation
fields.purpose: Anchors the quoted line to the demanded line so the comparison aligns the same item across every supplier's quote and traces back to the requisition line.

fields.name: itemId
fields.label: Item
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when the RFQ line references a catalog Item (null for free-text lines)
fields.validation: an ONBOARDED item, or null for a free-text/ad-hoc line carried from the requisition
fields.purpose: Identifies the catalog item being priced so the quoted unit price can update last-purchase-price context and feed the abnormal-price-spike check; null for free-text lines that have no master item yet.

fields.name: quantity
fields.label: Quoted Quantity
fields.validation: > 0; defaults to the RFQ line quantity; the supplier may quote a different quantity (e.g. MOQ) which is flagged on the comparison
fields.purpose: The quantity the unit price applies to; usually the demanded quantity but a supplier may quote to a minimum order quantity, which the buyer sees against the requisition need.

fields.name: uom
fields.label: Unit of Measure
fields.validation: a configured unit of measure; matches the RFQ line UoM unless the supplier quotes a pack/alternate UoM
fields.purpose: The unit the price is per; required so unit prices are comparable across suppliers and convert correctly into the PO line.

fields.name: unitPrice
fields.label: Unit Price
fields.validation: > 0; quote currency; per the line UoM; updated under the same lineId on each negotiation revision
fields.purpose: The per-unit price, the core comparison input at line level; feeds line landed cost, the spike flag vs last purchase price, and the agreed price on the awarded contract/PO line.

fields.name: lineTotal
fields.label: Line Total
fields.validation: quantity x unitPrice; quote currency; recomputed on any line edit/revision
fields.purpose: The extended line value; rolls up to the quotation headline price and the per-quote landed-cost base so the comparison reflects line quantities, not just unit rates.

fields.name: leadTime
fields.label: Lead Time (days)
fields.validation: >= 0; promised days from order to delivery for this line
fields.purpose: The promised delivery lead time per line; a direct input to the delivery-time dimension of scorecard-weighted ranking and to checking the quote against the requisition need date.

fields.name: lineNotes
fields.label: Line Notes
fields.purpose: Per-line caveats the supplier adds (substitute grade, partial availability, validity) that the buyer weighs during line-level comparison.

invariants: A1 the requisition identifier (via RFQ/Quotation) is immutable end to end
A12 unit prices are normalized to base via the quote currency for cross-supplier comparison
A13 each line submission/revision is audited and broadcast
the supplier is the sole editor of its own quote lines (sourcing invariant)
lineTotal is always quantity x unitPrice (recomputed on edit)
